title: CTAB-Based Protocol for Genomic DNA Extraction from Fungal and Bacterial Samples
author: Wellington Santos Fava

steps.title: The method is based on
steps.instruction: The method is based on: - Cell lysis with CTAB under high ionic strength - Protein digestion with proteinase K - Mechanical disruption using metal beads - Purification with phenol:chloroform:isoamyl alcohol - Alcohol precipitation of DNA

steps.title: Sample preparation Add to a 2 mL tube
steps.instruction: Sample preparation Add to a 2 mL tube: A loopful of fungal biomass 490 μL CTAB buffer 10 μL proteinase K 6 steel beads

steps.title: Homogenization Homogenize under the following conditions
steps.instruction: Homogenization Homogenize under the following conditions: 3 cycles 3400 rpm 30 s each 30 s intervals Maximum time before the next step: 5 minutes.

steps.title: Lysis Incubate at 60 °C for...
steps.instruction: Lysis Incubate at 60 °C for 60 min Maximum time before the next step: 10 minutes.

steps.title: Organic extraction Add 500 μL phenol:chloroform:isoamyl...
steps.instruction: Organic extraction Add 500 μL phenol:chloroform:isoamyl alcoholMix briefly (vortex)Centrifuge: 15 min 12,000 rpm 4 °C

steps.title: Contaminant precipitation Transfer 500 μL of...
steps.instruction: Contaminant precipitation Transfer 500 μL of the supernatant to a new 1.5 mL tubeAdd 225 μL of 5 M ammonium acetateMix by inversionIncubate on ice for 30 min12. Centrifuge: 10 min 12,000 rpm 4 °C

steps.title: DNA precipitation Transfer 500 μL of...
steps.instruction: DNA precipitation Transfer 500 μL of the supernatant to a new 1.5 mL tubeAdd 275 μL isopropanolMix by inversionCentrifuge: 5 min 12,000 rpm 4 °C

steps.title: Washing Discard the supernatantAdd 500 μL...
steps.instruction: Washing Discard the supernatantAdd 500 μL cold 70% ethanolCentrifuge: 5 min 12,000 rpm 4 °C Remove the ethanol completely using a pipette tip after a quick spin.

steps.title: Drying Dry at 37 °C for...
steps.instruction: Drying Dry at 37 °C for 10–15 min Do not exceed this time.

steps.title: Elution Add 50 μL ultrapure water...
steps.instruction: Elution Add 50 μL ultrapure water or TE buffer Incubate at 37 °C for 20 min

steps.title: Electrophoresis 3 μL DNA + 3...
steps.instruction: Electrophoresis 3 μL DNA + 3 μL GelRed 120 V for 50 min Criterion: intact high-molecular-weight band.

steps.title: Quantification (NanoDrop) Acceptable ranges
steps.instruction: Quantification (NanoDrop) Acceptable ranges: 260/280: 1.8–2.0 260/230: ≥ 1.8 (ideal > 2.0) Minimum concentration: PCR: ≥ 10 ng/μL qPCR: ≥ 20 ng/μL

steps.title: Excess biomass reduces purity
steps.instruction: Excess biomass reduces purity. Degraded phenol compromises DNA. Residual ethanol inhibits PCR. Over-dried pellet hinders elution.
